steps.title: Identify the core goal
steps.content: The question asks for a choice that emphasizes a similarity between P waves and S waves. The correct answer must highlight what they share, not differences.

steps.title: Match the shared features
steps.content: Choice A directly states two shared characteristics: both P and S waves travel beneath Earth's surface and both cause the ground to move. B contrasts their speeds, C mentions only P waves, and D uses “Although” and “very differently” to emphasize differences. That matches choice A — A is correct.
